---
title: "LULCC_CH_model"
format: html
server: shiny
execute:
  echo: false
---

````{r}
selectInput("OS", "Operating system:",
                c("Windows", "GNU/Linux"))
textOutput("result")
````

````{r}
#| context: server
   output$result <- renderText({
     paste("You chose test:", input$OS)
   })
````

```{ojs}
viewof flavor = Inputs.checkbox(["Salty", "Spicy", "Sour", "Umami"], {label: "Flavor"})
```
